sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: AbbVie Stock (ABBV) After Hours on Dec. 24, 2025: What Happened Today and What to Know Before the Next Market Open
feed.summary: AbbVie Inc. (NYSE: ABBV) finished the shortened Christmas Eve session higher and remained essentially flat in after-hours trading, settling at $229.90. With a holiday-shortened trading day and light volume, the stock's stability reflected a lack of major company-specific news. Investors are now focused on positioning for the Dec. 26 market open, considering macro factors, policy risks, and upcoming calendar catalysts like the Jan. 16, 2026 ex-dividend date and late January earnings.

feed.title: Seagate Technology (STX) Stock After Hours Today, Dec. 24, 2025: What Happened After the Bell and What to Watch Before Markets Reopen

Markets will remain closed on Christmas Day and reopen on December 26, 2025.

feed.summary: Home Depot (HD) saw a modest after-hours slip on December 24, 2025, following a holiday-shortened trading session, ahead of the market's closure for Christmas Day. feed.title: Wells Fargo (WFC) Stock After Hours Today, Dec. 24, 2025: Where It Closed, What’s Driving the Move, and What to Watch Before the Next Market Open
feed.summary: Wells Fargo (WFC) stock closed in positive territory on a shortened Christmas Eve trading session, continuing to trade modestly higher after hours and nearing new 52-week highs. The positive movement is attributed to a broad market rally, a bank-friendly macroeconomic environment with expectations of rate cuts in 2026, and Wells Fargo's strategic expansion into options clearing. Investors are watching for Q4 2025 earnings on January 14, 2026, as the next major catalyst.

feed.title: PulteGroup Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: PulteGroup Inc. (PHM) shares surged by 1.68% to $119.35 on Wednesday, breaking a six-day losing streak, while the broader market also saw gains with the S&P 500 Index (SPX) up 0.32% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) rising 0.60%. This performance indicates a positive trading session for the company amidst overall market strength.

feed.title: Johnson Fistel Investigates General Motors Company (GM) Directors for Potential Breaches of Fiduciary Duty Related to Vehicle Safety and Cruise AV Disclosures
feed.summary: Johnson Fistel, PLLP is investigating potential derivative claims against General Motors Company (GM) directors and officers for alleged breaches of fiduciary duty. This investigation follows a securities class action lawsuit claiming GM made misleading statements regarding vehicle safety, airbag defects, and the development status of Cruise LLC's autonomous vehicle technology. Shareholders who continuously held GM shares before February 2, 2022, are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their rights.

feed.title: SPY ETF Daily Update, 12/24/2025
feed.summary: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) gained 0.35% on Wednesday, fueled by strong U.S. economic data, easing inflation, and robust technology stocks. The ETF saw $3 billion in net outflows over five days, despite positive retail sentiment, while hedge funds decreased their holdings. SPY has a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target implying 15.18% upside, and an ETF Smart Score of eight.

feed.title: Viatris Inc. stock rises Wednesday, outperforms market
feed.summary: Viatris Inc. (VTRS) stock saw a gain of 2.15% on Wednesday, closing at $11.85, which outperformed the broader market's daily decline. Despite this daily gain, the stock remains below both its 52-week high and its 50-day moving average.

feed.title: Omnicom Group Inc. stock underperforms Wednesday when compared to competitors despite daily gains
feed.summary: Omnicom Group Inc. (OMC) stock gained 1.09% on Wednesday, closing at $90.58, but it still underperformed compared to its competitors. Despite the daily increase, the stock trailed the S&P 500's gain of 0.63% and competitors like Interpublic Group of Cos. Inc. and Publicis Groupe SA.

feed.title: AbCellera: Losing Its Undeserved Premium (NASDAQ:ABCL)
feed.summary: AbCellera is deemed an expensive biotech despite its technological investments, with limited short-term revenue and ongoing massive losses. Management continues to issue shares for stock-based compensation to retain talent, and its perceived AI premium is considered unfounded due to high R&D costs. Financial support from Canada, including approximately $160 million in remaining government funding, may help extend its operational lifespan.

feed.title: Texas and Florida customers of Vista Bank set to join a larger lender
feed.summary: National Bank Holdings (NYSE: NBHC) has received final regulatory approvals for its acquisition of Vista Bancshares and Vista Bank. The merger is expected to close on January 7, 2026, after Vista shareholder approval on December 19, 2025. This acquisition will add approximately $2.5 billion in assets and $2.2 billion in deposits to NBHC, resulting in pro forma assets of $12.6 billion and deposits of $10.7 billion.

feed.title: Inmune Bio Amends April 2024 Investor Warrants
feed.summary: Inmune Bio (INMB) amended investor warrants from its April 2024 offerings, reducing the exercise price to $1.95 and extending the expiration to June 30, 2026. This adjustment generated $67,416 in proceeds for the company. Despite an analyst rating of "Buy" with an $8.00 price target, TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark views INMB as Neutral due to financial challenges.

feed.title: Beedie Investments Ltd. Announces Filing of Updated Early Warning Report in Relation to Metalla
feed.summary: Beedie Investments Ltd. (Beedie Capital) has filed an updated early warning report after completing an internal reorganization of its holdings in Metalla Royalty and Streaming Ltd. As a result, Beedie Capital Investments Ltd. and Beedie Capital Holdings Ltd., both wholly-owned subsidiaries of Beedie Capital, now indirectly own and control 9,546,575 common shares of Metalla, representing approximately 10.31% of the issued and outstanding common shares. Beedie Capital holds these securities for investment purposes and may adjust its holdings in the future based on market conditions.

feed.title: Focus Universal stock rises after regaining Nasdaq compliance By Investing.com
feed.summary: Focus Universal Inc. (NASDAQ:FCUV) stock rose 1.6% in after-hours trading after the company announced it has regained compliance with Nasdaq’s listing requirements. The compliance was achieved by satisfying the minimum stockholders’ equity requirement through recent public offerings that generated $9.44 million in net proceeds. Focus Universal plans to showcase its IoT and AI-driven automation technologies, including its Universal Smart IoT platform and SEC Financial Reporting software, at the upcoming CES event.

feed.title: How HR leaders can spot and stop fake job applicants
feed.summary: Fake job applicants, often utilizing AI-generated identities, pose a significant security threat beyond being a mere recruiting nuisance. CHROs must collaborate with IT, security, and legal teams to detect these applicants, who might be seeking to install malware or steal data. The article details different types of fake applicants, detection methods like facial alteration and audio inconsistency checks, and the necessary governance involving HR, IT, and security departments.

feed.title: Visa boosts litigation escrow, impacting class B share conversion
feed.summary: Visa announced a $500 million deposit into its U.S. litigation escrow account, a move that will adjust conversion rates for its class B-1 and B-2 common stock into class A shares. This action effectively dilutes class B shares and has an earnings-per-share impact similar to repurchasing class A common stock, signaling a strategic capital allocation. Analysts currently rate Visa (V) as a "Buy" with a $416.00 price target.

feed.title: FFIV Investors Have Opportunity to Lead F5, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm announces a class action lawsuit against F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that F5 misled investors about its revenue outlook and growth, while downplaying a significant security incident. Investors have until February 17, 2026, to move the Court to serve as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (PG) Stock After Hours Today (Dec. 24, 2025): Holiday Close Recap, Fresh Headlines, Analyst Forecasts, and What to Know Before the Next Session
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) closed up 0.91% at $144.49 on a holiday-shortened Christmas Eve session, with after-hours trading showing minimal change on thin liquidity. The U.S. markets will be closed on Christmas Day, resuming trading on Friday, December 26. Analysts generally maintain a "Buy" rating for PG, with price targets ranging from $151 to $186, while investors monitor ongoing debates on staples' performance, interest rates, and the impact of the "Santa Claus rally" as the next earnings report approaches in January 2026.

feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) stock reached a new 52-week high of $106.45 on a holiday-shortened Christmas Eve session, driven by a broader "Santa rally" in the U.S. market and investor interest in defensive growth stocks. feed.title: Hologic stock (HOLX) after-hours on Dec. 24, 2025: CVR milestone risk, Blackstone–TPG deal spread, and what to watch before the next market open
feed.summary: Hologic stock (HOLX) experienced after-hours trading around $74.80 on Christmas Eve 2025, influenced by its pending acquisition by Blackstone and TPG for up to $79 per share, including a non-tradable Contingent Value Right (CVR). A key concern for investors is the reported difficulty in achieving the 2026 CVR milestone after Hologic stopped shipping specific breast biopsy needles. The CVR's value is directly tied to Breast Health revenue, making any product disruption a crucial factor for the market as it assesses the deal's overall value and closing conditions.

feed.title: Johnson Fistel Investigates Claims on Behalf of Molina Healthcare, Inc. (MOH) Shareholders
feed.summary: Johnson Fistel, PLLP is investigating potential derivative claims against Molina Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: MOH) due to alleged fiduciary breaches related to undisclosed medical cost trends. The investigation stems from a class action lawsuit covering shareholders who held shares continuously before February 5, 2025, and continued to hold them, concerning alleged failures by Molina and its executives to disclose adverse information. These alleged nondisclosures reportedly led to substantial stock declines for the company.

Investors are focused on the company's AI strategy, particularly Agentforce, and its ability to drive bookings and monetization. Future growth expectations and Analyst price targets for CRM vary widely, reflecting ongoing debate about the company's AI trajectory and its impact on growth.

feed.title: Vicor Corp CEO Vinciarelli sells $2.1m in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Vicor Corp CEO Patrizio Vinciarelli sold $2.1 million worth of company stock on December 22, 2025, involving 19,000 shares at prices ranging from $104.9823 to $106.76. Despite this sale, Vicor maintains strong financials and analysts anticipate revenue and net income growth. The stock, which has returned 125% over the past year, is currently deemed overvalued by InvestingPro.

feed.title: 12 Consumer Staples Stocks Moving In Wednesday's After-Market Session
feed.summary: This article details the after-market performance of 12 consumer staples stocks on Wednesday, categorizing them into gainers and losers. Notable gainers include Maison Solutions, Arcadia Biosciences, and Davis Commodities, while losers include Farmmi, Bonk, and CIMG. The article provides the stock movement percentage, current price, and market capitalization for each company mentioned.

feed.title: Focus Universal receives Nasdaq conditional compliance for continued listing
feed.summary: Focus Universal Inc. (NASDAQ:FCUV) has announced that it received a conditional compliance letter from Nasdaq for continued listing, having rectified its stockholders' equity deficiency. The company previously fell below Nasdaq's requirements but demonstrated compliance based on its December 17, 2025, Form 8-K filing. This conditional compliance allows FCUV to remain listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market, contingent on ongoing adherence to all other listing requirements.

feed.title: Exclusive: Nvidia buying AI chip startup Groq for about $20 billion in its largest acquisition on record
feed.summary: Nvidia is making its largest acquisition to date, purchasing assets from AI chip startup Groq for approximately $20 billion. Groq, founded by creators of Google's tensor processing unit, will enter a "non-exclusive licensing agreement" with Nvidia, with Groq's CEO and other senior leaders joining Nvidia while parts of Groq will continue as an independent company. This deal significantly bolsters Nvidia's position in the competitive AI chip market.

feed.title: Sanofi pushes ahead on adult vaccines with $2.2 billion Dynavax deal
feed.summary: Sanofi announced its agreement to acquire U.S. biotech Dynavax Technologies for approximately $2.2 billion, adding an adult hepatitis B vaccine and a promising experimental shingles shot to its portfolio. This acquisition aims to diversify Sanofi's vaccine business, especially given new U.S. policy changes affecting childhood immunizations. The deal, expected to close in Q1 2026, will also bring Dynavax's Heplisav-B and an experimental shingles vaccine, Z-1018, into Sanofi's product pipeline to drive future revenue growth.

feed.title: Canopy Growth Corporation: Time to Cut Losses?
feed.summary: Canopy Growth Corporation (NASDAQ: CGC) stock is trending down amid investor concern over market volatility and persistent issues, with its latest quarterly report showing shrinking revenue and operational losses. While the company is implementing restructuring schemes and has seen an increase in cash flow, large long-term liabilities remain a concern, impacting stock movements and investor confidence. Analysts are debating whether this downturn presents a buying opportunity or a signal for continued struggles, emphasizing risk management and data-driven decisions over speculative hopes.

feed.title: Euda Health Holdings Limited (EUDA) Stock Price | Live Quotes & Charts | NASDAQ
feed.summary: This article provides current stock information for Euda Health Holdings Limited (EUDA), including its live quotes and charts. It highlights a significant price increase of 42.72% for EUDA, trading at $2.74, and notes the absence of analyst ratings or earnings information. feed.title: EUDA Launches Stem Cell Therapy Platform with Shenzhen Clinic
feed.summary: EUDA Health Holdings Ltd. has launched a comprehensive stem cell therapy platform and opened its first longevity clinic in Shenzhen, China. This initiative marks a significant step in the Singapore-based biotech company's longevity-focused strategy, combining regenerative medicine with customized health solutions. The new platform and clinic aim to address the growing demand for preventive healthcare in Asia's aging populations, offering advanced treatments like immune cell therapies, iPSC technology, and AI-driven health management.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs (GS) Stock After the Bell on Dec. 24, 2025: Shares Close at $910.78 — What to Know Before Markets Reopen
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs (GS) stock closed higher at $910.78 on a shortened Christmas Eve session, with shares largely unchanged in after-hours trading. The article highlights key factors influencing GS stock, including a broad "Santa rally," thin holiday trading liquidity, a data breach warning related to an outside law firm, and plans for significant expansion in Japan's mid-cap deals market. Investors are advised to watch for follow-up news on the data incident, deal-flow temperatures, rate expectations, and upcoming Q4 2025 earnings in mid-January.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Stock Touched a New 52-Week High: Is More Upside Left?
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company's shares recently hit a new 52-week high, driven by optimism about its entry into the options clearing business and the removal of a regulatory asset cap. The company's strategic moves, including business simplification, cost efficiency initiatives, and AI adoption, are expected to support its growth and profitability. Analysts anticipate further upside for the stock, especially with projected earnings rises and an "inexpensive" valuation relative to its industry.

feed.title: Pacasmayo (CPAC) Is Up 52.07% in One Week: What You Should Know
feed.summary: Pacasmayo (CPAC) has seen a significant price increase of 52.07% in one week, driven by strong momentum and positive earnings estimate revisions. The stock, currently holding a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) and a Momentum Style Score of B, has outperformed its industry and the S&P 500 over various timeframes, indicating a promising outlook for investors.

feed.title: Aramark Gets Initial Settlement Approval in Wage Class Lawsuit
feed.summary: Aramark Services Inc. has received initial federal court approval for a class-action settlement regarding allegations of unlawfully compelling employees to work through unpaid breaks. The proposed settlement, totaling $95,000, awaits final approval and includes attorney's fees, costs, and a service award for the lead plaintiff. The class was conditionally certified by the US District Court for the Northern District of California.

feed.title: AstraZeneca Reaches Settlement With MSN Labs Over Cancer Drug
feed.summary: AstraZeneca Plc has settled a patent infringement dispute with MSN Laboratories Pvt Ltd. concerning its blood-cancer drug, Calquence. The settlement, formalized by a federal court in Delaware, enjoins MSN from infringing specific patents related to the drug's active ingredient, acalabrutinib maleate. The lawsuit alleged that MSN's tablets infringed two of AstraZeneca's patents for Calquence.

feed.title: Bank of Hawaii (NYSE:BOH) Shares Down 3.8% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Bank of Hawaii (NYSE:BOH) shares recently dropped 3.8% to $67.50, with trading volume significantly below average. Analysts offer divided opinions, holding a consensus "Hold" rating with a target price of $71.25. Despite the dip, the bank exceeded quarterly EPS estimates, pays a strong dividend yield of 4.1%, and currently has a market capitalization of $2.69 billion.

feed.title: InvestingPro’s Fair Value model predicted Webull’s 48% stock decline By Investing.com
feed.summary: InvestingPro's Fair Value model accurately predicted a nearly 48% stock decline for Webull Corporation (NASDAQ:BULL) starting in late July 2025. The model flagged Webull as substantially overvalued at $16.05, suggesting a fair value of $8.78, which proved accurate as the stock now trades at $8.37. This analysis, based on multiple valuation methodologies, identified fundamental weaknesses despite strong revenue growth, highlighting the platform's ability to foresee market disconnects.

feed.title: H. B. Fuller (NYSE:FUL) Stock Price Down 4.5% - Here's Why
feed.summary: H. B. Fuller (NYSE:FUL) shares dropped 4.5% to $57.48 on Wednesday with significantly lower-than-average trading volume. Despite recent insider selling, analyst sentiment remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $66.20, including recent upgrades from Citigroup and Seaport Res Ptn. The company has a market cap of $3.11 billion and pays an annualized dividend of $0.94, yielding 1.6%.

feed.title: Tesla faces NHTSA probe over Model 3 emergency door handles
feed.summary: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) has launched a probe into the emergency door releases in certain Tesla Model 3 vehicles following a petition claiming they are "hidden, unlabeled, and not intuitive." This investigation covers approximately 179,071 Model 3 sedans from the 2022 model year and expands on previous scrutiny of Tesla's door systems, which has included reports of occupants being trapped after crashes. The move comes after a Tesla owner stated he had to kick his way out of his burning Model 3 due to difficulty locating the emergency release.

feed.title: Key facts: KeyCorp files SEC prospectus for 161.9 million shares; deadline December 27, 2025
feed.summary: KeyCorp has filed a prospectus with the SEC to register 161,968,762 common shares. These shares are intended for The Bank of Nova Scotia, with a registration deadline set for December 27, 2025.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Just Opened Its New Bahamas Club on Paradise Island, With Three Pools and the World’s Largest Swim-Up Bar
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean has opened its new Royal Beach Club Paradise Island, an exclusive all-inclusive beach destination blending Bahamian culture with the cruise line's signature service. The club features three distinct zones including Party Cove with the world's largest swim-up bar, Chill Beach, and Family Beach, offering varied experiences for guests. This opening marks the first of Royal Caribbean's Royal Beach Club Collection, with another planned for Cozumel in 2026.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoran Inc. (FCX) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz are inviting shareholders of Freeport-McMoran Inc. (FCX) who suffered losses to join a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Freeport failed to disclose inadequate safety measures at its Grasberg Block Cave mine, leading to heightened risks for workers and misrepresenting the company's business prospects. The lead plaintiff deadline for the lawsuit is January 12, 2026.

feed.title: Better Home & Finance (NASDAQ:BETR) Stock Price Up 5.1% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Better Home & Finance Holding Company (NASDAQ:BETR) saw its share price increase by 5.1% during Wednesday's trading, closing at $37.7510. The article details analyst rating changes, insider stock sales, and institutional ownership movements for the company.

feed.title: Mainland investors pour money into Hawaii self-storage market with at least six new projects
feed.summary: Mainland investors are heavily investing in Hawaii's self-storage market, with at least six new projects initiated this year. Developers are swiftly addressing a decades-long accumulated demand for self-storage facilities across the islands. The market leader, U-Haul and Extra Space Storage, are spearheading this expansion.

feed.title: 4 Retail Apparel Stocks Poised to Lead Consumer Rally in 2026
feed.summary: The retail apparel and footwear industry is expected to experience a major upcycle in 2026, driven by stabilizing interest rates, improving wage growth, and healthier inventory levels. Companies like American Eagle Outfitters, Urban Outfitters, Boot Barn, and The Gap are well-positioned to benefit from this consumer rally due to their strong brands, differentiated products, and agile omnichannel strategies. These firms are focusing on operational discipline, merchandising, and customer engagement to drive growth and profitability.

feed.title: Is Advance Auto Parts Recovering with New Leadership?
feed.summary: Advance Auto Parts Inc. (AAP) stocks have seen a 4.15% increase, driven by the appointment of Ronald Gilbert as senior VP of supply chain and insights from a recent DA Davidson conference call. While the company has shown mixed financial results including negative net income and ROE, Gilbert's leadership is expected to streamline operations and improve profitability. Investors are keenly watching for how these strategic changes will impact future performance and aid in the company's financial recovery.

feed.title: Deere & Company Snaps Six-Day Slide as Analysts Signal a Cyclical Floor Amid Industrial Sector Resurgence
feed.summary: Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) ended a six-day losing streak on December 24, 2025, with a modest rebound supported by bullish analyst ratings suggesting a cyclical bottom amidst a challenging fiscal year. This rebound, fueled by analysts affirming "Buy" and "Outperform" ratings and the strategic acquisition of Tenna, signals a potential shift in market sentiment towards a 2026 recovery in the industrial sector. The company is transitioning from a traditional manufacturer to a technology-first enterprise, focusing on precision agriculture and recurring software revenue to drive future growth.

feed.title: Citi’s Strategic Gambit: Inside the Aggressive Investment Banking Expansion Targeting a 2026 M&A Supercycle
feed.summary: Citigroup is aggressively expanding its investment banking division, pursuing a high-stakes talent acquisition strategy to capitalize on an anticipated M&A supercycle in 2026. This strategic pivot, marked by significant hires and a leaner management structure, aims to achieve an 11%-12% Return on Tangible Common Equity for 2026. The move is also positioning Citi to benefit from a broader industry shift towards growth and a focus on AI integration and energy transition deals.

feed.title: 3 Bank Stocks to Keep on Your Radar as They Reach New 52-Week Highs
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. (C), U.S. Bancorp (USB), and Bank of America Corporation (BAC) have recently reached new 52-week highs, driven by strong market performance, robust Q3 U.S. GDP growth, and anticipated interest rate cuts in 2026. These banks are also strengthening their long-term growth prospects through AI investments, digital capabilities, strategic acquisitions, and expanding their financial center networks. The article highlights reasons for continued upside potential for each of these three major bank stocks.
